body.title: docs: design_docs/standards.md — forensic logging, module structure, testing, DB access
body.result: Created design_docs/standards.md — 388 lines covering forensic logging (forensic_logger API, what must be logged, bash pattern), module structure (tool template, registration pattern, new-tool checklist), error handling (no silent failures, no bare except), database access (Postgres only, jsonb_exists, json.dumps, ON CONFLICT qualification), testing (live systems, file naming), inertia levels (table + practical meaning + Igor self-edit gates), and OR model ID format. Single source of truth for Claude and Igor. Future: promote to DSB for Igor memory traversal.
body.description: Create design_docs/standards.md as authoritative reference for: forensic logging (what, where, how often), module structure (imports, registry pattern, docstrings), error handling (no bare except, always log), database access (psycopg2 only, jsonb_exists pattern), testing (live systems), inertia levels with examples. Single source of truth for both Claude and Igor (future DSB memory). Part of startup tree for new modules.
